article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 26, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association (BGMEA) President Faruque Hassan today called upon the globally renowned fashion company PVH to increase their sourcing of high-value garments from Bangladesh.

He also requested PVH to forge long-term partnership with their Bangladeshi suppliers in developing their capacity in manufacturing more diversified apparels and also in making production process more sustainable.

He made the comments during a meeting

llm_connections.evidence_quote: making headway in developing its capacity and accordingly upgrading its technologies and machinery, the country will be catering to the demand of global buyers for diversified garment items.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly says Bangladesh's capacity and technology upgrades will cause it to 'be catering to the demand of global buyers', which refers to supplying international buyers (exports volume).

verification.quote_best_match: making headway in developing its capacity and accordingly upgrading its technologies and machinery, the country will be catering to the demand of global buyers for diversified garment items.
verification.judge_reasoning: The exact sentence appears in the article and explicitly links Bangladesh's capacity and technology upgrades to its ability to 'cater to the demand of global buyers,' which is a country-level claim about supplying international buyers (exports).
